raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja tas Preesteris kah-
du Zilweku pirzin pirzis / tam
buhs no ta ehst / un kas winna
Nammā dsimmis irr/ teem buhs
no winna Barribas ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja ta Preestera Meita
pee kahda fivefcha Wihra buhs /
tad winxai ne buhs no to Swehtu
Leetu Rustinafchanas - Uppura
ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr ja ta Preestera
Meita weena Atraitne / jeb At-
stahdinata buhs / un winnai
Dsimmuma ne irr / un ta fawa
Tehwa Nammā / itt ta' / kad ta
wehl Meita bija/ irr nahkuji/ tad
buhs winnai fawa Tehwa Maisi
ehst : bet ne weenam Swechinee-
kam buhs no ta ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja kas to Swehtu ne-
apdohmigi ehdihs/ tad buhs win-
nam to peektu Teefu pahr to pee-
likt/ un tam Preesteram lihdsar to
Sivehtu atdoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ne buhs teem Israēfa
Behrnu Swehtas Leetas fagah-
niht/ ko tee tam KUNGAM par
Pazelschanas-Uppuri dewufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tee Noseegumu un Ap-
grehkofchanu us fewim ne welē/
kad tee winnu Swehtas Leetas ehō/
jo es esmu tas KUNGS / kas
tohs fivehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGGrunnaja
us Mohsu/un fazziia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Runna us Aāronu / un
us winna Dehleem / un us wi-
feem Israēta Behrneem/ un fakki
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "us teein : Kursch no Israēta Nam-
ma/ un no teein Swechineekkeim,
starp Israēlu irr / kas fawu Up-
puri grib peenest / laid buht ni
wiffadahm winnu Apfohlifha-
nahm / un no wiffadeem winni
Uppureem/ kas no labba Prahta-
nahk/ ko tee tam KUNGAM pa-
Dedsainu-Uppuri grib uppureht
ka tas no jums winnam patih-
kams buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neffeer weenu Tehwin-
no leeleen Lohpeem / Jehru un
Rasu/ kas bes Wainas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiffu/kam kahda Wa-
na irr / ne buhs jums uppureht
jo tas ne buhs labbi patihkam-
no jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja kas tam KUNGAM
weenu Pateiffschanas-Uppuri pe-
ness/ weenu fewisku Apfohlisch-
nu / jeb no labba Prahta no lee-
leen Lohpeem / jeb no fihkeen
Lohpeem/ tam buhs bes Waina-
buht/ ka tas labbi patihkams irr-
tam ne buhs ne kahdas Waina-
buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irr tas akts / jeb irr win-
nam Luhsuns / jeb irr tas eetva-
nohts / jeb kahrpains / jeb kra-
pains / jeb kafchfains / schahdu-
jums ne buhs tam KUNGAM
uppureht / un no teem jums
buhs tam KUNGAM uggun-
us to Altari likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kahdu Wehrti je-
Avi/ kam wiffai gazri jeb wi-
ihfi Lohzekti irr/warrat juhs po-
weenu Uppuri no labba Prah-
fataisiht / bet par Apfohlisch-
Hh
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
